---
title: "About"
image: pfp.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/0xphu
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/lequangphu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/phuqle/
---

To my parents, I am a dependable son. To my close friends, I am a lake covers with ice, boring and cold at the first impresson, and when the ice breaks ...

95% of my day starts or ends with a workout. Health is my number 1 priority.

My motto is taking a lot of bets. And I am learning to do that.

My work experience can be summarized as an analyst, currently self-employed and focusing on crypto. Before that I spent a few years in Ecommerce Growth and Corporate Finance.
